hero.title: Hello, I'm Vinícius
hero.subtitle:
I'm a senior software engineer with 6+ years of experience leading the development of high-performance web and mobile applications. Strong in JavaScript, React, and TypeScript across the full stack—from frontend (React Native, SolidJS) to backend (Go, Node.js).

I excel at building complex features such as interactive dashboards and real-time chat systems. I mentor teams and manage end-to-end app store deployment. Motivated problem-solver, comfortable in fast-paced environments.

items.title: Path Trader
items.description: Premium full-stack SaaS for traders: journaling, performance analytics, risk context, subscriptions (Asaas), partner program with admin workflows, AI assist, PWA, and a TypeScript monorepo with multiple Next.js surfaces and a NestJS API.

items.title: Rick and Morty Explorer
items.description: An animated series explorer following the adventures of a super scientist and his grandson, featuring complex character relationships and intergalactic discoveries.

items.title: Vestra Financial Management
items.description: Mobile-first PWA for personal finance, built as a TypeScript monorepo with a Vite + React 19 dashboard, a Next.js 16 marketing site, and a NestJS API backed by Prisma on PostgreSQL. Multi-user workspaces with owner/member permissions and deep cloning, recurring transactions generated by a scheduled cron, JWT auth with refresh-token rotation, and free/pro subscription gating. Shared shadcn/ui + Tailwind 4 design system across both frontends. Deployed on Fly.io (API) and Vercel (web) with managed Neon Postgres.

jobs.description: As the co-founder and lead developer of Path Trader, an independent self-funded platform, I designed and built a TypeScript monorepo for traders to journal trades, review performance, manage risk, and run a partner program. Developed primarily in my free time, I owned both the Next.js client applications and the NestJS API—from data modeling with Prisma through payments, file storage, realtime notifications, and production-oriented tooling.
achievements: Architected a pnpm and Turborepo monorepo with a shared Prisma schema, internal UI packages (Radix-style primitives, Recharts), and multiple Next.js surfaces (main app, marketing site, admin, landing).
Delivered the trading journal (accounts, trades, tags, strategies, emotions) plus imports from common broker and export formats; built analytics and path-rank style performance views.
Implemented Lexical-based journal and documents with folders and document types; integrated Asaas billing and a partner program with an admin app for approvals.
Shipped an AI assistant (OpenAI) with usage-aware behavior; authentication with NextAuth.js on Next apps and JWT plus Passport on the API.
Connected Pusher notifications, AWS SES email, and S3 presigned uploads; NestJS backend with validation, throttling, schedules, and BullMQ on Redis.
Delivered a PWA with Serwist; observability with Sentry across Next.js and Node.
Implemented Jest, React Testing Library, and Playwright quality gates; GitHub Actions CI/CD with path-filtered deploys for API, web, site, admin, and landing.
Operational automation: scheduled database backups to S3 and a daily develop → main sync workflow with pull requests and checks before merge.
Leveraged AI-driven development workflows using tools like Cursor, Claude, and Antigravity to rapidly prototype, iterate, and accelerate the project's time-to-market.

jobs.description: As a frontend engineer at Bird, I collaborate closely with designers to deliver highly accessible interfaces while actively expanding my full-stack impact through backend development in Go. On the sales development team, I drive end-to-end feature delivery for lead, opportunity, and account management.
achievements: Developed and maintained Go-based API endpoints, handling core business logic for the sales development team and improving system stability.
Architected a custom analytics engine and cross-app dashboard using Malloy, SolidJS, and Vega, empowering users to dynamically compose charts based on selected metrics.
Led the frontend redesign of the marketing cloud, establishing a scalable component system with Radix UI and Tailwind CSS.
Implemented complex data visualization UIs across the product suite utilizing TanStack Table, Recharts, and Chart.js.
Championed quality assurance by establishing rigorous automated testing workflows with Vitest, React Testing Library, and Playwright.

jobs.description: As a senior software engineer at MULTTI, I took on a technical leadership role, guiding the engineering team, streamlining workflows, and contributing hands-on across the stack (React/React Native frontends and PHP backends).
achievements: Mentored junior engineers and optimized agile development workflows to ensure reliable feature delivery.
Architected and built a highly interactive real-time chat system using React, PusherJS, WebSockets, and virtualized lists for performance at scale.
Led the end-to-end development of a delivery-tracking React Native mobile app featuring live maps, push notifications, and custom UI.
Developed comprehensive full-stack solutions, including a lead management system (React, MUI) and a financial market streaming platform.
Modernized the CI/CD pipeline and infrastructure by introducing Docker, AWS, and Bitbucket Pipelines, reducing deployment friction.
Managed the full lifecycle of mobile applications, including automated deployments to Google Play and the App Store.

jobs.description: As a software engineer at Solution4apps, I led the technical delivery of multiple web and mobile projects, taking ownership from initial discovery through to production release.
achievements: Engineered a feature-rich React Native mobile app incorporating interactive maps, real-time camera processing, push notifications, and NativeWind.
Built a responsive, real-time financial markets platform using Next.js, Socket.io, Chakra UI, and React Spring.
Delivered a highly performant and accessible public-sector web application leveraging Next.js and Tailwind CSS.
Oversaw end-to-end project execution, configuring infrastructure and managing app store deployments for mobile products.

education.title: Specialization: Next.js, React, React Native, TypeScript
